originalTitle: Reinforcement Learning 10,000x Faster - Joseph Suarez, Warwick AI Summit
title: Building Neural MMO and PufferLib for 10,000x Faster Reinforcement Learning
summary: Presented the development journey of Neural MMO and PufferLib, showing how engineering optimizations achieved 10,000x speedups in reinforcement learning training. Demonstrated a 6-second Breakout solve using custom C environments and optimized training pipelines.
